name: Breakfast Bread Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove and discard crusts from bread; cut the bread into cubes.
2. Toss the bread cubes lightly with cream cheese cubes.
3. Place the bread and cream cheese mixture in a greased 13x9x2-inch baking pan.
4. In a large mixing bowl, beat the eggs.
5. Add milk, maple syrup, and salt to the beaten eggs; mix well.
6. Pour the egg mixture over the bread and cream cheese combination.
7. Cover and refrigerate for at least 8 hours or overnight.
8. Remove from the refrigerator about 30 minutes before baking.
9. Bake, uncovered, at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 40-45 minutes or until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean.
10. Let stand for 5 minutes before cutting.
Yield: 6-8 servings
"Alma Andrews of Live Oak, Florida notes, "I assemble this dish the day before our grandchildren visit, giving me more time for fun with them."
